annotation.summary: A mathematically meaningful, sequence-indexed DLL removal specification was implemented and passes three canonical direct symexec runs, case_lib compilation, and full goal-check compilation. Strict completion is blocked only because qcp-mcp is unavailable in the current agent tool inventory and filesystem; direct symexec is not claimed as a substitute.

spec_design.mathematical_meaning: nodes is the traversal-order sequence of all non-removed nodes from successor to predecessor; the predicate owns exactly the interior forward/back links while omitting first.prev and last.next as explicit circular boundary cells
spec_design.precondition_effect: owns the designated node fields, successor.prev = designated node, predecessor.next = designated node, and the sequence-indexed open path
spec_design.postcondition_effect: owns successor.prev = predecessor, predecessor.next = successor, the unchanged open-path sequence, and the removed node with both fields self-linked
spec_design.alias_handling: supports successor = predecessor (the lone sentinel around one member) without overlapping ownership because node_prev and node_next are distinct fields; requires the designated member itself to differ from both boundary nodes

cycles.diagnostic: Assign Exec fail at line 26 because the initial opaque xizi_dllseg did not expose successor.prev ownership

cycles.repair: replaced the opaque-boundary segment with xizi_dll_open plus explicit boundary field ownership

qcp_mcp_interactive_evidence.tool_inventory_evidence: No qcp-mcp callable tool was present in the agent tool inventory; list_mcp_resources exposed only codex_apps resources.
qcp_mcp_interactive_evidence.local_command_evidence: command -v qcp-mcp returned no path; bounded filesystem searches found no qcp-mcp executable or script.
qcp_mcp_interactive_evidence.reason: annotation-checking explicitly forbids treating direct symexec success as qcp-mcp success

repair_history: initial compile failed because string scope was not imported

goal_check_evidence.note: Supplemental round evidence only; controller still owns canonical acceptance and source_goal_version creation.

checked_scope: function Require/Ensure logical and spatial effect
annotation_checking_evidence.spec_definition_status: passed: strict sequence-indexed open DLL path predicate, not an algorithm mirror
annotation_checking_evidence.function_spec_status: passed: states both boundary repairs and detached self-linked ownership while preserving the non-removed node sequence
annotation_checking_evidence.invariant_status: not-applicable: target function contains no loop
annotation_checking_evidence.annotation_scratch_lib_changes: added xizi_dll_open and the separation-logic imports/scopes required to define it
annotation_checking_evidence.summary: All semantic checks pass, but annotation-checking cannot return passed while qcp_mcp_requirement_satisfied is no.
failed_checks: qcp-mcp interactive check could not be run because the required tool is unavailable

repairs_completed_inside_spawn: made boundary field ownership explicit after symbolic-execution failure
recompiled case_lib after adding the missing string scope
reran canonical symbolic execution three times to file end

self_repair_budget.early_terminal_reason: required qcp-mcp toolchain is completely unavailable after inventory, command-path, resource, and bounded filesystem checks; artificial waiting is not permitted

read_categories: skill-linked annotation/checking rule and quality documents
current round target C, target header, and case_lib seed
previous_attempt report/output explicitly authorized by the handoff
QCP_demos_LLM doubly-linked-list C/header examples and matching LLM formal predicate definitions
searches: rg constrained to QCP_examples/QCP_demos_LLM for DLL representations
exact-path reads of QCP_demos_LLM DLL formal libraries
rg constrained to annotation/orchestrator skill directories for qcp-mcp entry points
bounded filename search for a local qcp-mcp executable

blockers.reason: The annotation-checking quality gate requires a successful qcp-mcp run to file end, but this agent session provides no qcp-mcp tool, resource, command, or local executable. Direct symexec succeeded but is explicitly forbidden as a substitute.
blockers.recommended_action: Controller/main should retry this annotation round only in an environment that exposes qcp-mcp; the candidate and direct fixed-tool evidence are reusable analysis, but controller acceptance must remain false until the MCP check genuinely passes.

timing.timing_gap: Rule reading, spec design, edits, failed compile dependency build, tool availability audit, and report preparation were not captured by an external incremental activity ledger and are not retrospectively estimated.
